description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a sprawling, elongated footprint set on a rectangular plot of land. The structure features a prominent gable roof with multiple intersecting sections, including a main central gable and several smaller gables over projecting wings. The front facade is characterized by a covered porch supported by columns, and a bay window that adds architectural interest. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, complemented by a stone or brick base along the porch area. Windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and grouped patterns, with larger windows on the front and smaller ones on the sides. The property includes a long attached garage extending from one side, and the surrounding terrain is gently contoured with a driveway leading to the garage.
description: A spacious, single-story bungalow with a gabled roof, covered front porch, bay window, and an attached garage, set on a landscaped plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, bay window, main entrance, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the garage and the projecting side wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back elevation, roofline, and the full extension of the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear wing and the side of the garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window on front facade and grouped side windows
